description: TencentDB Agent Memory agent hooks for Claude Code

hooks.command: TDAI_MEMORY_HOOK_MARKER=SessionStart TDAI_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8421 TDAI_USER_ID=claude-code TDAI_HOOK_LOG=<home>/.claude/tdai-memory/logs/hooks.jsonl PYTHONPATH=<repo>/packages/tdai-memory-cli:<repo>/packages/tdai-memory-mcp python3 -m tdai_memory_cli.hook session-start

TDAI_MEMORY_HOOK_MARKER=UserPromptSubmit TDAI_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8421 TDAI_USER_ID=claude-code TDAI_HOOK_LOG=<home>/.claude/tdai-memory/logs/hooks.jsonl PYTHONPATH=<repo>/packages/tdai-memory-cli:<repo>/packages/tdai-memory-mcp python3 -m tdai_memory_cli.hook prefetch

TDAI_MEMORY_HOOK_MARKER=Stop TDAI_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8421 TDAI_USER_ID=claude-code TDAI_HOOK_LOG=<home>/.claude/tdai-memory/logs/hooks.jsonl PYTHONPATH=<repo>/packages/tdai-memory-cli:<repo>/packages/tdai-memory-mcp python3 -m tdai_memory_cli.hook sync-turn
